info.title: CodeAgent Backend API
info.description: Protocol version 1 API used by the CodeAgent IDEA capability gateway.

get.summary: Discover the backend authentication mode and PKCE endpoints
Start backend-mediated OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE

302.description: Redirect to the configured OIDC provider

get.summary: Complete the provider callback and redirect to the plugin loopback URI

302.description: Redirect to the verified plugin loopback callback

post.summary: Exchange a one-time code or rotate a refresh token

200.description: Backend access token and rotating refresh token

get.summary: Read the current user, usage, and session

post.summary: Create a durable subagent or history-summary job

delete.summary: Cancel a queued or running durable job

202.description: Cancellation accepted or terminal job returned unchanged

200.description: Configuration records for the requested kind

put.summary: Create or replace a typed product configuration record

get.summary: List backend-owned integration tools and configuration status

200.description: Configured and unavailable backend tool capabilities

post.summary: Execute one configured backend-owned integration tool

200.description: Real provider result normalized for the agent

502.description: Configured provider failed or returned an invalid response

503.description: Tool exists but its backend configuration is unavailable

post.summary: Rewrite a user prompt for the coding agent
Start an agent run and stream normalized events
post.description: Use streaming fetch. The response contains named SSE events documented in CONTRACT.md.

200.description: SSE stream. Events: run.started, turn.started, context.updated, tool.catalog.updated, verification.updated, message.delta, assistant.completed, tool.request, tool.completed, run.completed, run.error.

schema.description: Named SSE blocks whose JSON data payload matches SseEventPayload.

post.summary: Resume a run with one local tool result

ConfigurationValue.description: Server-normalized value. Required fields depend on the configuration kind.

historySummary.description: Compact factual memory from earlier conversation history. It is treated as data, not instruction authority.
